title: Bestway Pool Filter Cartridge
features: Helps to maintain clean, clear & healthier pool water
Ensures that filter pump runs more efficiently
Should be replaced every two to three weeks
description: From the manufacturer Bestway Filter Cartridges Keep your Lay-Z Spa or Pool clean and healthy The Bestway Filter Cartridges are essential for Lay-Z-Spa and above ground pool pumps as they filter out dirt and grime from the water to help keep it clean and healthy. How do they work? They work by catching dirt and grime when the water is pumped through them. As your pump will usually be continuously cleaning and filtering the water when it is turned on, this dirt can quickly build up, especially when the hot tub/pool is regularly used. To find out which filter cartridge is compatible with your pool or spa, please refer to your pump manual.
